recalls.Description: Target has issued a recall for the Spritz Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah due to potential fire hazards. These menorahs, crafted from blue polymer resin, stand 6 inches tall and 13 inches long, designed to hold up to nine tapered candles in metal cups on the dinosaur's back. The product's model number, '240-14-1380,' can be found on the hang tag attached to the dinosaur's neck.
recalls.Title: Target Recalls Spritz™ Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorahs Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to Target at 800-440-0680 for in-store purchases or 800-591-3869 for online purchases, available from 6 a.m. to 10 p.m. CT and 6 a.m. to 12 a.m. CT respectively. More details can be found at https://help.target.com/help/recalls or by visiting https://www.target.com/ and selecting 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Spritz Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah

Images.Caption: Recalled Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah
Recalled Taper Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorah

Injuries.Name: Target has received 58 reports of the menorahs scorching, charring, melting or catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Target stores across the country and online at Target.com from October 2024 to January 2025, priced around $15.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential burning or catching fire when candles are lit.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the menorahs immediately and return them to any Target store for a full refund via gift card or original payment method. Customers can also request a prepaid return label for mail returns.

recalls.metaDescription: Target recalls Spritz Resin Hanukkah Dino Menorahs due to fire hazards. Learn how to return for a refund.

recalls.Description: Mr. Christmas has issued a recall for its wireless decorative tree light controllers, which can potentially overheat and pose a fire hazard. These controllers are designed to wirelessly activate holiday lights on trees and consist of a lever or switch and a white receiver that plugs into an outlet. The controller features a peppermint candy design with a candy cane lever, labeled 'Christmas Light Controller' for those sold at Walmart and Cracker Barrel. The version available at Target, branded as Wondershop™, resembles a square switch box adorned with colorful balls and is labeled 'Tree Lighting Switch'.
recalls.Title: Mr. Christmas Recalls Wireless Tree Light Controllers Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Mr. Christmas at 800-489-6328 any day from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. MT, email recall@mrchristmas.com, or visit www.mrchristmas.com/recall.

Images.Caption: Recalled Target Wondershop Decorative Tree Light Switch
Recalled Target White Receiver displaying Model Number 39630
Recalled Walmart Mr. Christmas Decorative Tree Light Controller
Recalled Walmart White Receiver displaying Model No. 39611
Recalled Cracker Barrel Decorative Tree Light Controller
Recalled Cracker Barrel White Receiver displaying Model No. 39612

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 10 reports of overheating, including one report of a fire. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Mr. Christmas LLC, of Memphis, Tennessee

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart, Target, and Cracker Barrel stores nationwide, as well as online at Walmart.com, Target.com, and CrackerBarrel.com from July 2024 through November 2024, priced between $25 and $40.

Importers.Name: Target Inc., of Minneapolis, Minnesota for Wondershop™ branded products
Walmart Inc., of Bentonville, Arkansas for Mr. Christmas branded products
CBOCS Distribution Inc., of Lebanon, Tennessee for Cracker Barrel branded products

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential overheating of the wireless receiver.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product immediately and return it for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Mr. Christmas recalls wireless decorative tree light controllers due to fire hazards. Stop using and return for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Hallmark has issued a recall for its Keepsake Christmas Tree Ornament featuring the Cad Bane™ character from Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett. This ornament, measuring approximately 4.5 inches tall and 1.5 inches wide, is designed with a brown hat, brown jacket, brown pants, a green face, and blue cuffs. It was packaged in a collectible white storage box with red accents, marked with the code 2199QXE3341 on the bottom.
recalls.Title: Hallmark Recalls Cad Bane Christmas Tree Ornaments for Mold Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Hallmark at 800-425-5627 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. They can also visit https://care.hallmark.com/s/ to send an email or check www.hallmark.com/product-recalls for further details.

Products.Name: Cad Bane Keepsake Christmas Tree Ornament

Images.Caption: Recalled Hallmark Keepsake Christmas Tree Ornament - Cad Bane - Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett (front)
Recalled Hallmark Keepsake Christmas Tree Ornament - Cad Bane - Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett (back)
Collectible Box for recalled Hallmark Keepsake Christmas Tree Ornament - Cad Bane - Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett

Injuries.Name: The firm is aware of 16 consumer reports of the recalled tree ornaments having mold on them when they were taken out of the box. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Hallmark Gold Crown stores nationwide and online at Hallmark.com from September 2024 through October 2024 for approximately $22.

Importers.Name: Hallmark Cards, of Kansas City, Missouri

Hazards.Name: Mold growth due to improperly dried paint on the ornament, posing respiratory risks.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the ornament and return it to a Hallmark Gold Crown store or follow online instructions at www.hallmark.com for a prepaid shipping label to receive a full refund without needing a receipt.

recalls.metaDescription: Hallmark recalls Cad Bane Christmas Tree Ornaments due to mold risk. Learn how to return for a full refund.

recalls.Description: The recall affects Bunkhouse and Lotsa LITES! Connectable Mini String Lights, which consist of a nine-foot strand featuring 20 LED clear bulbs emitting white light. These lights can be powered by batteries or USB. They were sold in three packaging variations: Everyday (SKU: BHSTL24), Christmas (SKU: XSTL24), and Halloween (SKU: HSTL24), with the SKU located on the back of the packaging.
recalls.Title: Recall of Bunkhouse and Lotsa LITES! Mini String Lights Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact DM Merchandising at 800-548-6784 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or via email at customerservice@dmmerch.com. More details can be found online at https://247dm.com/globalassets/episerver-forms/0923-recall_string-lights.pdf or by visiting https://247dm.com and selecting "Important Recall Information."

Products.Name: Bunkhouse and Lotsa LITES! Connectable Mini String Lights

Images.Caption: Recalled Bunkhouse Connectable Mini String Lights

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports of the recalled string lights overheating. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at gift stores and boutiques nationwide, as well as online, from August 2023 through September 2023, priced between $10 and $13.

Importers.Name: DM Merchandising Inc., of Elmhurst, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Overheating bulbs posing burn and fire risks

Remedies.Name: Stop using the lights immediately, unplug them, and contact DM Merchandising for a full refund and recall participation details.

recalls.metaDescription: Bunkhouse and Lotsa LITES! Mini String Lights recalled due to fire hazards. Contact DM Merchandising for refunds and safety information.
